accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
adminLoginHint: Admin accounts sign in here too. LearnLab will send admins to the admin workspace automatically after login.
adminSignupNotice: Admin accounts are not created from this form. If you need admin access, use a provisioned account and sign in.
agreeToTermsRequired: You must agree to the terms to create an account
emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your account
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
invalidUsername: Use 3 or more characters. Letters, numbers, and . @ + - _ are allowed.
joinLearnLab: Join Learn Lab and master Discrete Mathematics
learnerLoginHint: Learner accounts go straight to the learner dashboard after successful sign in.
learnerSignupDescription: Create a learner account that connects directly to the backend registration flow.
learnerSignupOnly: This signup flow creates a learner account and automatically prepares the linked learner profile on the backend.
loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
loginFlowDescription: Sign in with your LearnLab account. Routing is based on your backend role.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
redirectingToLearnerSpace: Setting up your learner space and signing you in...
registrationFailed: Registration failed. Please review your details and try again.
registrationSuccessLogin: Account created successfully! Sign in with your new credentials below.
seededLearnerHint: If backend seed data is enabled, use the seeded learner credentials documented in the backend README for a quick auth check.
serverUnreachable: Cannot reach backend server. Please ensure the Django server is running on port 8000.
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
usernameHelper: Required by the backend. Pick a unique public handle for your account.
